non_blocking_findings.summary: Explicitly list the internal driver helpers to reduce implementation ambiguity.
Document that root registry readout calls validateSchedulerLoopRunArtifact from the extracted artifacts module.
After extraction, reviewer execution policy imports should be owned by the driver module only.
manifestIdentity can remain in the root module because only registry/recovery uses it.
Add an explicit root public re-export map, matching prior public export compatibility phases.

decision.summary: DeepSeek found no implementation-blocking gaps in the LFA-P28 plan. It agreed that the proposed utils, driver, artifacts, and root compatibility boundaries preserve scheduler-loop behavior, public exports, artifact validation, registry/recovery, workflow-state recording, and fallback semantics when paired with export parity, focused gates, full tests, large-file gate, and post-implementation DeepSeek review.
